          +----------+
          |  Output  |
          +----------+
                ^
+---------------o-o----------------+
|                 |                |
|                 |                |
|             +---+---+            |
|             |  End  |            |
|             +-------+            |
|                 ^                |
|                 |                |
|         +----+--+-+-----+        |
|   +-----+----+    +-----+----+   |
|   |  Path 1  |    |  Path 2  |   |
|   +----------+    +----------+   |
|         ^               ^        |
|         +-------+-------+        |
|                 |                |
|            +----+----+           |
|            |  Start  |           |
|            +---------+           |
|                 ^                |
|                 |                |
|  Process        |                |
+-----------------o----------------+
           +----+----+
           |  Input  |
           +---------+
